title: --classic forces rwx permission style even on Windows
body: PermissionFlag::from_cli() returns Some(Self::Rwx) whenever `cli.classic` is set, overriding the platform default of Attributes on Windows. Running `lsd --classic` on Windows shows meaningless rwx-style bits derived from attributes rather than the PowerShell-style attribute letters, which is confusing.

title: Request: expose NTFS compressed/encrypted attributes
body: WindowsAttributes currently only surfaces archive/readonly/hidden/system from FILE_ATTRIBUTE_*. It would be great to also show compressed and encrypted state (FILE_ATTRIBUTE_COMPRESSED / FILE_ATTRIBUTE_ENCRYPTED) since those are common on NTFS volumes and Explorer already color-codes them.

title: Git status column blank for files inside nested worktrees
body: When listing a directory that lives inside a git worktree added via `git worktree add`, the git status column in src/git.rs comes back empty for every file, even though `git status` works fine from that same directory. Looks like the repository discovery logic assumes a single `.git` directory layout.

title: --icon always noticeably slower on directories with thousands of files
body: Comparing `lsd --icon never` vs `lsd --icon always` on a directory with ~20k files, the icon-enabled run is multiple times slower. It looks like icon.rs / flags/icons.rs may be doing per-file glob/extension matching that isn't cached across the listing.

title: Unclear interaction between --permission and --classic in docs
body: The help text for `--permission` lists rwx/octal/attributes/disable, but it's not documented anywhere what happens when `--classic` is also passed — from reading permission.rs it looks like --classic silently wins, but a user would have no way to know that without reading the source.
